name: Horizontal Scroll
description: Vertical scroll drives horizontal card gallery — sticky container translates cards as user scrolls.
accessibility_notes: scroll hijacking may confuse keyboard/screen-reader users
ensure cards are focusable for keyboard navigation

items.description: Array of ReactNode elements to display as cards

cardWidth.description: Width of each card in pixels

className.description: CSS class for the outer scroll container

conflicts: tall scroll container height may feel jarring on short content pages
performance depends on number of items rendered
usage_tip: Good for portfolio or timeline sections; avoid on short content pages.
